Ak € lgo . ahes o0 € age E el 22 Ayl e oia o BT e S Q’SQ’{‘)ﬂ“é SAIE 250G el 3 2l A5 gais b o FoRe s s e e 2 tA oo tas 2 Rt szt sor Bibon T oAt s e @ s 0o $ai 3o ol (L2 1 628058 S0 2 £ 600 2023 Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah. And those with him are firm with the disbelievers ' and compassionate with one another. You see them bowing and prostrating* “in prayer’, seeking Allah’s bounty and pleasure. The sign “of brightness can be seen’ on their faces from the trace of prostrating “in prayer’. This is their description in the Torah.® And their parable in the Gospel is that of a seed that sprouts its "tiny” branches, making it strong. Then it becomes thick, standing firmly on its stem, to the delight of the planters “—in this way Allah makes the believers a source of dismay for the disbelievers. To those of them who believe and do good, Allah has promised forgiveness EUCEYICECE R
